headline: We hold ourselves to standards most clients never have to ask about
subtext: Three commitments that shape every brief we take on, regardless of budget or scale.

items.title: Material honesty
items.description: We spec what ages well over what photographs well — solid timber, stone, and natural fibre over veneer and laminate, every time it's viable.

items.title: One point of contact
items.description: A single lead designer follows your project from first sketch to final styling — no handoffs, no re-explaining the brief.

items.title: Fixed-scope pricing
items.description: You see the full cost breakdown before any contractor is booked. No surprise change orders mid-renovation.
